wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: A secured server farm with an employee monitoring system health

item.title: astra
Home
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
Cybex Consulting provides the services of trained cybersecurity experts to ensure an environment you can trust. Organizations large and small can all feel safe knowing our professional engineers are protecting your important systems and data.

For a list of our services please see our Services page. An account is required to complete the order.

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: Providing Security Solutions For Modern Systems

item.title: Comprehensive Penetration Testing & Red Teaming
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: A full-scale, simulated cyberattack on your organization to identify exploitable vulnerabilities before malicious actors do. This service goes beyond automated scanning to include manual exploitation of networks and systems, physical office security breaches, and targeted social engineering campaigns (phishing, vishing) to test human defenses. Deliverables include a detailed technical report and an executive summary of risk exposure.
item.excerpt:encoded: A full-scale, simulated cyberattack on your organization to identify exploitable vulnerabilities before malicious actors do.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Zaproxy dolore alias impedit expedita quisquam.

item.title: Network & Systems Architecture Assessment
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: A deep-dive review of your existing IT infrastructure to identify design flaws and security gaps. Our experts analyze network topologies, firewall configurations, cloud environments, and internal traffic flows to ensure your architecture aligns with industry best practices and Zero Trust principles. We provide actionable guidance to redesign or optimize your network for maximum resilience.

item.title: Security Solutions Deployment & Integration
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: End-to-end installation and configuration of enterprise-grade security tools. Whether you need next-generation firewalls, Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agents, Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) systems, or Data Loss Prevention (DLP) software, our team ensures these tools are seamlessly integrated into your environment without disrupting business operations.
item.excerpt:encoded: End-to-end installation and configuration of enterprise-grade security tools.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Zaproxy dolore alias impedit expedita quisquam.

item.title: Enterprise System Hardening
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: Reduce your attack surface by eliminating default configurations and securing operating systems, servers, and applications. We apply industry-standard frameworks (such as CIS Benchmarks) to disable unnecessary services, enforce strict access controls, apply critical patches, and secure communication protocols, ensuring your systems are fortified against automated and targeted attacks.
item.excerpt:encoded: Reduce your attack surface by eliminating default configurations and securing operating systems, servers, and applications.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Zaproxy dolore alias impedit expedita quisquam.

item.title: Security Awareness & Phishing Simulation Training
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: Transform your employees from your biggest vulnerability into your strongest line of defense. This proactive service includes customized, interactive training modules on modern cyber threats, password hygiene, and safe browsing. We pair this with ongoing, deceptive phishing simulations to test employee vigilance and track organizational improvement over time.
item.excerpt:encoded: This proactive service includes customized, interactive training modules on modern cyber threats, password hygiene, and safe browsing.

item.title: Compliance Readiness & Regulatory Advisory
item.dc:creator: hollieking33@gmail.com
item.content:encoded: Navigate complex regulatory landscapes with confidence. We provide gap assessments and preparation services for major security frameworks and mandates, including PCI-DSS, HIPAA, SOC 2, and GDPR. We help you map existing controls to regulatory requirements, draft necessary security policies, and ensure you are fully prepared for official audits.
item.excerpt:encoded: We provide gap assessments and preparation services for major security frameworks and mandates, including PCI-DSS, HIPAA, SOC 2, and GDPR.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Zaproxy dolore alias impedit expedita quisquam.
